tasks.build:client: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public && deno run -A npm:typescript/tsc --project src/client/tsconfig.json --outDir public && cp src/client/*.{html,css,json} public/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r src/client/assets public/ 2>/dev/null || true
tasks.start: deno task build:client && deno run --allow-net --allow-read src/server/main.ts
tasks.dev: deno task build:client && (deno task watch:client & deno run --allow-net --allow-read --watch src/server/main.ts)
tasks.check: deno check src/server/main.ts && deno task typecheck:client
